Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Children of the Dead Mother]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 11''' — The Consultants fought against the Dead Mother’s Children.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 12''' — The Children of the Dead Mother swarmed Urzaia and the blond Consultant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 16''' — The Children of the Dead Mother are a group that attacked Calder.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 10''' — The Children of the Dead Mother are monsters that haunt Nakothi's island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 10''' — The Children of the Dead Mother haunted the tunnels on the island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 11''' — The Dead Mother's Children are born from Nakothi's power embedding in human remains.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 13''' — People killed by Nakothi's released powers are reborn as Children of the Dead Mother.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 17''' — The Children of the Dead Mother are a group on Nakothi's island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 20''' — The children of the Dead Mother consist of hosts of Nakothi that use fleshy tails and claws of bone to climb.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 23''' — The Children of the Dead Mother are directed by Nakothi’s Handmaiden.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 6''' — The fight with the Dead Mother’s Children occurred five days ago.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 6''' — Calder has fought the Children of the Dead Mother.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 26''' — Children of the Dead Mother are swarming during a battle.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
